prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势（较2024年后移461名）、2026年招生计划持平、声誉负面舆情集中、本省考生总数小幅增加等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次在2025年基准3187名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约3237名，区间2868–3606名。

- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学、数据科学）。

- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）（物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2868–3606名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（工科试验班信息科学与技术、理科试验班物理与光电），一档专业（伯苓班、数学与大数据）作为冲刺，三档专业（物质科学、未来产业精英）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（2868名以内）可重点冲击一档拔尖计划专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5687 → 3880 → 2823 → 2726 → 3187. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (from 5687 to 2726), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, moving back about 461 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3187. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi Province: 68 in 2021, 67 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 68 in 2024, 67 in 2025, and 67 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 21st on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 20–23 range, placing it among the top universities nationwide. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fabrication, and multiple teachers were publicly reported) and teacher ethics incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), but popular videos contain much content about academic fraud. In 2022, there was a signal of a cutoff drop in Henan. Overall, the reputation signal is somewhat negative, potentially having a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nankai University has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Chinese History A, World History A, Political Science A, Marxist Theory A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-. The science enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class Information Science and Technology, Science Experimental Class Mathematics and Big Data, Science Experimental Class Physics and Optoelectronics, etc.) are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines such as mathematics, physics, and computer science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all 'highly recommended' or 'recommended'; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be relatively hot; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are 'differentiated and wait-and-see.' Nankai University's science programs include Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology), Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data, Physics and Optoelectronics), and other popular directions, which are attractive to candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (472,480), leading to slightly intensified competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin (not in the province), and its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025), which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift trend in 2025 (461 places back from 2024), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the concentration of negative reputation incidents, and the slight increase in the number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 3187. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3237, with a range of 2868–3606.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Program Boling Class) (Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Program Boling Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Finance and Economics) (Digital Economy, Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Sciences) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Materials Chemistry, Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2868–3606, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Engineering Experimental Class Information Science and Technology, Science Experimental Class Physics and Optoelectronics), use Tier 1 majors (Boling Class, Mathematics and Big Data) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Material Sciences, Future Industry Elite) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2868), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top talent program majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 444, 455, 415, 432, and 413 respectively. Overall fluctuations are small, with rankings in the past five years oscillating narrowly between 413 and 455. The 2025 baseline is about 413, the best level in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province: 26 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and 26 in 2026, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 18.75%, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 21st in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fraud, and multiple teachers were publicly reported) and incidents related to teacher ethics. Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), but popular videos contain much content about academic fraud. In 2022, there was a signal of a cutoff drop in Henan. Overall reputation signals are negative, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nankai University has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, with outstanding advantages in liberal arts: Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Chinese History A, World History A, Political Science A, and Marxist Theory A. Liberal arts enrollment majors (Finance, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Public Administration, Business Administration) all correspond to A-level or above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity shows: Law 'differentiated wait-and-see' (relatively hot but fiercely competitive), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics 'differentiated wait-and-see', Chinese Language/Chinese 'recommended', Teacher Education/Education 'differentiated wait-and-see'. Nankai's liberal arts majors mainly include Finance, Law, and Chinese Language, with overall popularity moderately hot. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025. Nankai University is located in Tianjin (not within the province), and its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is about 3.3% (2025), which is normal for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is the best in recent years (413th), the 2026 enrollment plan is significantly reduced (a decrease of 18.75% leading to intensified competition), and negative reputation public opinion is concentrated, the effect of the enrollment reduction pushing the ranking forward and the effect of the negative reputation pushing the ranking backward offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 387, with a range of 343–431.

- Law.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 343), one can focus on reaching for popular majors such as Finance and Law.
